LanguageData.RiTw.OneMoreChance: Recursive chance of another child born: {0}
LanguageData.RiTw.OneMoreChanceTT: The chance that an extra child will be born. This will be calculated again after each extra child.
LanguageData.RiTw.AffectAnimalsTT: When enabled, the multiple birth mechanic will also apply to animals. By default only humanlike pawns are affected.
